# Archived E1.3.5 — Instapaper Integration — Shared Context

This context file is historical. Instapaper is already represented in the
current codebase. Read `.github/copilot-instructions.md` first and use the
committed source code as the source of truth before relying on signatures below.

---

## Instapaper Full API (verified from https://www.instapaper.com/api/full)

Base URL: `https://www.instapaper.com`

All requests: **POST** only. OAuth params in `Authorization:` header, not query string.
OAuth 1.0a with HMAC-SHA1. xAuth is the **only** way to get tokens.

### Endpoints

| Endpoint | Purpose | Input | Output |
|----------|---------|-------|--------|
| `/api/1/oauth/access_token` | Get token via xAuth | `x_auth_username`, `x_auth_password`, `x_auth_mode=client_auth` | Form-encoded: `oauth_token=xxx&oauth_token_secret=yyy` |
| `/api/1/account/verify_credentials` | Verify token | (none) | `[{"type":"user","user_id":N,"username":"..."}]` |
| `/api/1/bookmarks/list` | List saved articles | `limit` (1-500, default 25), `folder_id` (optional: `unread`/`starred`/`archive`/folder_id) | `{"user":{...},"bookmarks":[{...}],"highlights":[...]}` |
| `/api/1/bookmarks/get_text` | Get article HTML | `bookmark_id` | Raw `text/html` (UTF-8), NOT JSON |

### Bookmark Object Shape

```json
{
  "type": "bookmark",
  "bookmark_id": 1234,
  "url": "https://example.com/article",
  "title": "Article Title",
  "description": "Brief description",
  "hash": "OjMuzFp6",
  "progress": 0.5,
  "progress_timestamp": 1288584076,
  "time": 1394470555,
  "starred": "0",
  "private_source": "",
  "tags": [{"id": 12, "name": "Tag Name"}]
}
```

### Error Format

```json
[{"type": "error", "error_code": 1040, "message": "Rate-limit exceeded"}]
```

### Key Error Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 1040 | Rate-limit exceeded |
| 1041 | Premium account required |
| 1042 | Application is suspended |
| 1241 | Invalid or missing bookmark_id |
| 1550 | Error generating text for URL |

### Credential Rules (from API docs)

- Username field label: "Email or username" (not just "Email")
- Password is optional — many accounts don't have one
- Password field label hint: "Password, if you have one"
- If account has no password, any value works

---

## OAuth 1.0a Signing (HMAC-SHA1)

For xAuth, the flow is:
1. Build OAuth params: `oauth_consumer_key`, `oauth_signature_method=HMAC-SHA1`, `oauth_timestamp`, `oauth_nonce`, `oauth_version=1.0`
2. Add xAuth params to POST body: `x_auth_username`, `x_auth_password`, `x_auth_mode=client_auth`
3. Build signature base string: `POST&{percent_encoded_url}&{percent_encoded_params}`
4. Sign with HMAC-SHA1 using key `{consumer_secret}&` (empty token secret for xAuth)
5. Add `oauth_signature` to Authorization header

After token acquisition, all subsequent requests sign with key `{consumer_secret}&{token_secret}`.

Use `package:crypto` for HMAC-SHA1 (already a transitive dependency via Flutter).

---

## Dependencies to Add

### pubspec.yaml additions

```yaml
dependencies:
  flutter_secure_storage: ^9.2.4  # Token persistence (iOS Keychain / Android EncryptedSharedPreferences)
```

**Do NOT add `dio`** — project uses `http: ^1.2.1` for HTTP. Use `package:http` for all network requests.

`package:crypto` is already available as a transitive dependency — import `package:crypto/crypto.dart` for HMAC-SHA1.

---

## Existing Code Signatures

### ContentNormaliser (lib/features/content/services/content_normaliser.dart)

```dart
class ContentNormaliser {
  static Future<ExtractedDocument> normalise(String input, ContentType type) async;
}

enum ContentType { plainText, markdown, html }

class ExtractedDocument {
  const ExtractedDocument({required this.sentences, this.pageBoundaries = const [], this.totalPages = 0});
  final List<Sentence> sentences;
  int get totalWords => sentences.fold(0, (sum, s) => sum + s.words.length);
  List<String> get allWords => sentences.expand((s) => s.words).toList();
}
```

**Instapaper articles**: Call `ContentNormaliser.normalise(html, ContentType.html)`.

### SharedContent (lib/features/content/models/shared_content.dart)

```dart
class SharedContent {
  const SharedContent({required this.type, required this.data, this.title, this.mimeType, this.receivedAt, this.action = ShareAction.readNow});
  factory SharedContent.text(String text, {String? title});
  factory SharedContent.htmlText(String html, {String? title});
}

enum SharedContentType { text, url, pdfFile, epubFile, htmlText }
enum ShareAction { readNow, import_ }
```

### ShareIntentProvider Pattern (lib/features/content/providers/share_intent_provider.dart)

```dart
sealed class ShareIntentState {
  const factory ShareIntentState.idle() = ShareIntentIdle;
  const factory ShareIntentState.processing({required SharedContent content, double progress}) = ShareIntentProcessing;
  const factory ShareIntentState.done({required SharedContent content, required ExtractedDocument document}) = ShareIntentDone;
  const factory ShareIntentState.error({required String message, SharedContent? content}) = ShareIntentError;
}

@Riverpod(keepAlive: true)
class ShareIntent extends _$ShareIntent {
  ShareIntentState build() => const ShareIntentState.idle();
  Future<void> ingest(SharedContent content) async { ... }
  void clear() { ... }
}
```

### Riverpod Provider Pattern (codegen)

```dart
import 'package:riverpod_annotation/riverpod_annotation.dart';
part 'my_provider.g.dart';

@riverpod
class MyNotifier extends _$MyNotifier {
  @override
  MyState build() => const MyState();

  Future<void> someMethod() async {
    state = ...; // update state
  }
}
```

- `@riverpod` → auto-dispose (default for non-global providers)
- `@Riverpod(keepAlive: true)` → persist across navigation (for auth state)
- Always run `dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs` after creating/modifying

### Router Pattern (lib/navigation/app_router.dart)

```dart
GoRoute(
  path: '/read-clipboard',
  pageBuilder: (context, state) {
    final clipboardDoc = state.extra as ClipboardDocument?;
    return wallFoldTransitionPage(
      key: state.pageKey,
      child: ParallaxReadingScreen(
        filePath: 'clipboard://${clipboardDoc?.title ?? 'clipboard'}',
        clipboardDocument: clipboardDoc,
      ),
    );
  },
),
```

### Library Screen (lib/screens/library_screen.dart)

- `LibraryScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget`
- Sections: header → clipboard prompt → PDF list
- Design tokens: `RunThruTokens`, `RunThruTypography`
- Navigation: `context.push('/read-clipboard', extra: doc)`
- Import: `import 'package:runthru/design/design.dart';`

### Design Tokens

| Token | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `RunThruTokens.shellBase` | Background color |
| `RunThruTokens.shellAccent` | Buttons, FAB |
| `RunThruTokens.shellTextPrimary` | Primary text |
| `RunThruTokens.shellTextSecondary` | Hint/secondary text |
| `RunThruTokens.shellError` | Error state |
| `RunThruTokens.shellProcessing` | Loading state |
| `RunThruTypography.display` | Large heading |
| `RunThruTypography.title` | Section titles |
| `RunThruTypography.body` | Body text |
| `RunThruTypography.caption` | Small text |

---

## Out of Scope — Do NOT Touch

- `lib/core/orp.dart`
- `lib/three_d/` (entire directory)
- ContextReveal code
- Gesture system code
- Existing PDF/EPUB extraction
- WPM dial, hints

## Hard Rules (subset for this epic)

1. All colors via design tokens. No raw `Color(0xFF...)`.
2. All text styles via typography tokens.
3. Riverpod for state. No `setState()` for shared state.
4. go_router only. No `Navigator.push()`.
5. No raw `CircularProgressIndicator`/`LinearProgressIndicator`.
6. Touch targets: ≥48dp.
7. No color-only signals. Shape/label/position fallback on every indicator.
8. OAuth tokens in `flutter_secure_storage` only. Never log credentials.
9. No silent network calls. User confirms before fetch.
10. Article content stays on device after fetch.
11. All public symbols have dartdoc comments.
12. Run `dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs` after modifying @riverpod providers.

## Test Baseline

264 pass, 20 skip, 4 pre-existing failures. Do NOT introduce new failures.
